lines.speaker: HAIDER
lines.line: We can take him down, Iqra. I've been watching Hadi's racing schedule, we know exactly when and where he'll be.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: IQRASH
lines.line: But are we sure he's the one we want? What if he's not as weak as he seems?
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of HAIDER, eyes gleaming with determination.

lines.speaker: HAIDER
lines.line: He's our only chance at redemption, Iqra. We can't let him get away.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of IQRASH, her eyes narrowing in skepticism.

lines.speaker: HAMMAD
lines.line: Hey, guys, I couldn't help but overhear. Why don't we settle this like men, in the upcoming annual car race?
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAMMAD, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: HAIDER
lines.line: You think you're funny, don't you, Hammad? Trying to turn this into some joke.
lines.visual_cue: Wide shot of HAMMAD, his smile confident and inviting.

lines.speaker: HAMMAD
lines.line: Not at all, my friend. I just think it's time we put our skills to the test.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of HAIDER, his eyes flashing with anger.

lines.speaker: HADI
lines.line: Come on, baby, just a little more power...
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of HADI, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: HADI
lines.line: I can do this. I have to do this.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of HADI, his eyes fixed on the engine.

lines.speaker: HAIDER
lines.line: Let's show him what we're made of, Iqra!
lines.visual_cue: Wide shot of the starting line, the cars a blur of color and light.

lines.speaker: IQRASH
lines.line: You got this, Haider. We're in this together.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, his eyes blazing with competitiveness.

lines.speaker: HAIDER
lines.line: What the...? How did he do that?
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of HADI, his hands gripping the wheel tightly.

lines.speaker: HAIDER
lines.line: Congratulations, Hadi. You won this time.
lines.visual_cue: Wide shot of the finish line, HADI's car a triumphant conqueror of the track.

lines.speaker: HADI
lines.line: Thanks, Haider. But it's not over yet.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of HAIDER, his face a mask of respect.
